business.name: Bhi Construction
business.tagline: Macon's roofing crew that shows up ready

hero.headline: When your roof can't wait, *we don't either*
hero.subheadline: 4.9 stars across Macon because we fix it right the first time — storm damage, leaks, or full replacements.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Every roof job we handle
services_section.subheading: From quick leak fixes to complete roof replacements — we handle what Central Georgia weather throws at your home

services.title: Storm Damage Repair
services.description: Hail, wind, and fallen trees don't wait for convenient timing. Neither do we. Quick assessment and lasting repairs that insurance companies approve.

services.title: Leak Detection & Repair
services.description: That drip in your ceiling started somewhere specific. We find it fast and seal it permanently — no guesswork, no callbacks.

services.title: Complete Roof Replacement
services.description: When patches won't cut it anymore. Full tear-off and installation with materials built for Georgia summers and winter storms.

services.title: Gutter Installation
services.description: Proper water flow keeps your foundation dry and your roof lasting longer. Custom-fitted gutters that actually work.

about.heading: Roofing Macon the right way
about.body: Bhi Construction handles roofing projects across Central Georgia with the kind of work ethic that gets noticed. We show up when we say we will, use materials that last, and clean up like we were never there. Our 4.9-star rating comes from doing exactly what we promise — nothing more complicated than that.

reviews.name: Natalie R.
reviews.text: Outstanding work on our roof project. Their attention to detail and expertise really shows — trustworthy team that delivers exactly what they promise.

reviews.name: Shelby R.
reviews.text: Professional crew from start to finish. They made the whole roofing process stress-free and the results speak for themselves.

reviews.name: Nicholas W.
reviews.text: Impressed with how quickly they completed our roof work without cutting any corners. Finished ahead of schedule with top-quality results.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Central Georgia
service_areas.subheading: Quality roofing work throughout the region

cta.heading: Ready to fix your roof right?
cta.body: Get a straight answer about your roofing project. Free estimates, honest timelines, and work that lasts.
